title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE DISTRICT OFFICE OF THE LAND TRANSPORTATION OFFICE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ROSALES, PROVINCE OF PANGASINAN, INTO A CLASS "A" DISTRICT OFFICE AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
Manila Bulletin, April 01, 2025 p.7

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 12139, March 27, 2025 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE DISTRICT OFFICE OF THE LAND TRANSPORTATION OFFICE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ROSALES, PROVINCE OF PANGASINAN, INTO A CLASS "A" DISTRICT OFFICE AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The existing district office of the Land Transportation Office (LTO) in the Municipality of Rosales, Province of Pangasinan, is hereby converted into a Class "A" district office.

SEC. 2. The Secretary of the Department of Transportation shall immediately include in the Department's program the operationalization of the Class "A" LTO District Office in the Municipality of Rosales, Province of Pangasinan, the initial funding of which shall be charged against the current year's appropriation of the LTO Rosales District Office. Thereafter, the funding of which shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect after fifteen (15) days following the completion of its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in a newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(SGD.)

FRANCIS "CHIZ" G. ESCUDERO

(SGD.)

FERDINAND MARTIN G. ROMUALDEZ

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act, which originated in the House of Representatives, was passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate of the Philippines on September 18, 2023 and December 18, 2024, respectively.

(SGD.)

RENATO N. BANTUG, JR.

(SGD.)

REGINALD S. VELASCO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: MAR 27 2025

(

SGD.)

FERDINAND ROMUALDEZ MARCOS JR.

President of the Philippines
